I can easily fall over here

[Single Wooden Bridge]
Now that I got my workout in, Let's go eat

I'm here at the campground
I had no idea this place existed in Yeongju
The view is amazing, can you see it? There's a fall over there too
[A view perfect for mukbang]
Yeongju is also known for their beef, so I'll be eating that
[Yeongju Beef]
Yeongju's beef, pork, and chicken are all delicious because of their climate/temperature change
So I prepared all of them
I'll share some too since that's a lot of food
Bon appetit
That sound

Amazing That looks so good

That looks really delicious

That's insane

Amazing

I'm leaving
